printed.name: Thigh Stretch with RUBar
printed.setup: Kneeling in upright position, legs hip width apart, arms straight and shoulder width apart, hands holding RUBar, palms facing down, crossbar at eye level

movement.exhale: Tilt pelvis posteriorly, lower body back

cues: Start and end movement in neutral spine position
Maintain posterior tilt of pelvis when hinging back and up
Create long line from knees through thighs and trunk
